caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved top featuring decorative floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is gesturing with both hands held up in front of her chest, moving them to emphasize her points. Her facial expressions shift as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing and her eyes occasionally blinking. While her position remains centered and stationary, her hands move fluidly from a wider open position to a more closed, gesturing motion, and her head tilts slightly as she continues her presentation.
